user.name: Sam
user.bio: Software Engineer | Go, Java, Python, C++ | CS Graduate (Magna Cum Laude) | Clean code, strong fundamentals

node.name: job-visualizer
node.description: Cross-platform Go desktop application (GUI + CLI) for importing, filtering, analyzing, and visualizing job application data with geocoded mapping and interactive charts.

node.name: smart-tello-follower
node.description: Autonomous DJI Tello drone follower using real-time face recognition and gesture control with OpenCV and face_recognition library.

node.name: concurrent-file-processor
node.description: High-performance concurrent file processor built in Java. Features custom thread pools, GUI + CLI modes, and real-time analysis of large sets of text files.

node.name: enviro-sensor-hub
node.description: Arduino-based environmental monitoring system written in C++. The project reads data from various environmental sensors and provides functionality to display and document the collected readings.
